## 🚀 Pull Request

### 📋 Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail. What does this PR do? -->

### 🎯 Type of Change
<!-- What type of change is this? -->
- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 **Documentation** (documentation only changes)
- [ ] 🎨 **Style** (formatting, missing semi colons, etc; no code change)
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance** (code change that improves performance)
- [ ] 🌍 **Localization** (translation or localization changes)
- [ ] 🔒 **Security** (security-related changes)
- [ ] 🧪 **Testing** (adding or updating tests)

### 🌍 Language Support
<!-- Does this change affect Hindi and English support? -->
- [ ] **Hindi** - Hindi translations/changes
- [ ] **English** - English translations/changes
- [ ] **Both** - Changes to both languages
- [ ] **N/A** - No language changes

### 📱 Testing
<!-- How have you tested these changes? -->
- [ ] **Unit Tests** - Unit tests pass
- [ ] **Integration Tests** - Integration tests pass
- [ ] **E2E Tests** - End-to-end tests pass
- [ ] **Manual Testing** - Manually tested
- [ ] **Mobile Testing** - Tested on mobile devices
- [ ] **Language Testing** - Tested both Hindi and English

### 🔧 Technical Details
<!-- Any technical details reviewers should know about. -->
- **Dependencies**: <!-- New dependencies added -->
- **Breaking Changes**: <!-- Any breaking changes -->
- **Performance Impact**: <!-- Performance implications -->
- **Security Impact**: <!-- Security implications -->

### 📸 Screenshots
<!-- Add screenshots if your changes affect the UI. -->
<!-- Drag and drop screenshots here -->

### 📋 Checklist
<!-- Go over all the following points, and put an `x` in all the boxes that apply. -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's **code style**
- [ ] I have performed a **self-review** of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the **documentation**
- [ ] My changes generate no new **warnings**
- [ ] I have added **tests** that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been **merged and published**
- [ ] I have checked that both **Hindi and English** work correctly
- [ ] I have tested on **mobile devices**
- [ ] I have considered **accessibility** implications

### 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues here. -->
- Closes: <!-- Issue number(s) -->
- Related: <!-- Issue number(s) -->
- Depends on: <!-- Issue number(s) -->

- English translation improvements

## 🙏 Thank You!

Thank you for contributing to SarkariSaathi! Your contribution helps us make government schemes accessible to every Indian citizen.

**हिंदी में**: SarkariSaathi में योगदान देने के लिए धन्यवाद! आपका योगदान हमें हर भारतीय नागरिक के लिए सरकारी योजनाओं को सुलभ बनाने में मदद करता है।

## 🎨 Review Guidelines

### 👀 For Reviewers
Please review this PR focusing on:
1. **Code Quality** - Is the code clean and maintainable?
2. **Functionality** - Does it work as expected?
3. **Testing** - Are tests comprehensive?
4. **Documentation** - Is documentation updated?
5. **Language Support** - Do both Hindi and English work?
6. **Accessibility** - Is it accessible to all users?
7. **Security** - Are there any security concerns?
8. **Performance** - Does it impact performance?

### 💬 Review Process
1. **Initial Review** - Review the code and functionality
2. **Testing** - Test the changes locally
3. **Feedback** - Provide constructive feedback
4. **Approval** - Approve if everything looks good
5. **Merge** - Merge after approval and CI passes

---

**🏛️ SarkariSaathi - Empowering Every Indian with Government Schemes**
